title: Otter.ai Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for using Otter.ai for transcriptions and note-taking.

commands.description: Converts an audio file into text
commands.scenario: When you need a written version of a meeting or lecture

commands.description: Provides a summary of the key points from a meeting transcript
commands.scenario: When you need a quick overview of a meeting

commands.description: Allows you to share a transcript with others
commands.scenario: When you need to collaborate or share meeting notes

commands.description: Highlights important sections of a transcript
commands.scenario: When you want to emphasize key information in a transcript

commands.description: Exports the transcript as a PDF file
commands.scenario: When you need a hard copy or offline version of a transcript

commands.description: Finds specific words or phrases in a transcript
commands.scenario: When looking for specific details in a long transcript

commands.description: Inserts images into a transcript for better context
commands.scenario: When visual aids are needed alongside text

commands.description: Allows editing of the transcribed text for accuracy
commands.scenario: When correcting errors in the transcription

commands.description: Identifies and tags different speakers in a transcript
commands.scenario: When distinguishing between multiple speakers in a meeting

commands.description: Connects Otter.ai with Zoom for live transcription
commands.scenario: When you want real-time transcription during Zoom meetings

commands.description: Sorts transcripts into folders for better organization
commands.scenario: When managing multiple transcripts and need organization

commands.description: Removes a transcript from your account
commands.scenario: When you no longer need a transcript and want to free up space

commands.command: Generate action items and follow-up tasks
commands.description: Ask Otter to extract a specific checklist of tasks, owners, and deadlines from the conversation.
Use the Otter AI Chat to ask specific questions like 'What was the budget discussed?' or 'What was the consensus on the timeline?'
Automatically schedule Otter to join your upcoming calendar events without manual intervention.
Request a structured outline with headings and sub-points to understand the meeting flow at a glance.

commands.command: Search for specific keywords across all transcripts
commands.description: Use the global search bar to find every instance a specific term or project name was mentioned across your entire library.

commands.command: Ask Otter questions about the meeting content
commands.description: Use the Otter AI Chat to ask specific questions like 'What was the budget mentioned?' or 'Did anyone disagree with the proposal?' to extract instant answers without reading the full text.

commands.command: Generate a custom study guide or quiz
commands.description: Paste the transcript into the AI chat and command: 'Based on this transcript, create a 5-question multiple-choice quiz to test my knowledge of the topics discussed.'

commands.command: Convert transcript to a LinkedIn post or email draft
commands.description: Use the prompt: 'Transform the key insights from this meeting into a professional LinkedIn post' or 'Draft a follow-up email to the team based on these notes.'
Ask the AI: 'Analyze the tone of this meeting. Was the feedback generally positive, neutral, or critical?' to gauge team morale or client satisfaction.

commands.command: Extract a glossary of technical terms
commands.description: Use the prompt: 'Identify all technical jargon or acronyms used in this transcript and provide a brief definition for each' to help onboard new team members.
